cells.value: Refer to IAS-3120 Disassembly and Assembly
cells.text: Refer to IAS-3120 Disassembly and Assembly

cells.value: After removing the casing, the spectrum analyzer location is shown in the figure
cells.text: After removing the casing, the spectrum analyzer location is shown in the figure

cells.value: After removing the casing, remove the 4 screws within the circle to detach the front panel (ensure to use tape to secure the screen during removal to prevent it from falling off)
cells.text: After removing the casing, remove the 4 screws within the circle to detach the front panel (ensure to use tape to secure the screen during removal to prevent it from falling off)

cells.value: As shown, use a utility knife to cut the white adhesive connecting the spectrum analyzer, then remove the two screws securing the optical fiber to the spectrum analyzer, and finally remove the two screws securing the spectrum analyzer bracket to the baseplate. Disconnect the USB interface connected to the core board, and remove the spectrum analyzer. Reassemble in reverse order.
cells.text: As shown, use a utility knife to cut the white adhesive connecting the spectrum analyzer, then remove the two screws securing the optical fiber to the spectrum analyzer, and finally remove the two screws securing the spectrum analyzer bracket to the baseplate. Disconnect the USB interface connected to the core board, and remove the spectrum analyzer. Reassemble in reverse order.

cells.value: As shown, first disconnect the ribbon cables from the core board and PD board (ensure the blue side of the ribbon cable faces outward), then remove the screws securing the PD board and core board, replace the PD board and core board. Reassemble in reverse order.
cells.text: As shown, first disconnect the ribbon cables from the core board and PD board (ensure the blue side of the ribbon cable faces outward), then remove the screws securing the PD board and core board, replace the PD board and core board. Reassemble in reverse order.

cells.value: 2. Two screws for the PD board
cells.text: 2. Two screws for the PD board

cells.value: 4. Remove the wiring of the core board
cells.text: 4. Remove the wiring of the core board

cells.value: 3. Four screws for the core board
cells.text: 3. Four screws for the core board

cells.value: As shown, first disconnect the ribbon cable from the DMD board (ensure the blue side of the ribbon cable faces outward), then remove the screws securing the DMD board, replace the DMD board. Reassemble in reverse order.
cells.text: As shown, first disconnect the ribbon cable from the DMD board (ensure the blue side of the ribbon cable faces outward), then remove the screws securing the DMD board, replace the DMD board. Reassemble in reverse order.
